info.title: A tool for joining a set of .cs files into one file.
info.description: This dotnet core (cli) tool can be used to join a set of .cs files into one big source file. Uses roslyn to parse each input file and ensure correct output.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A command line tool to merge a set of C# files into one single file.

options.name: input
options.description: The folder containing the C# files you want to merge

options.name: output
options.description: Target file name (e.g. 'output.cs'). If not provided, the output is written to the console.

options.name: preprocessor-directives
options.description: A list of preprocessor directives that should be defined. Code between undefined #if/#endif directives is ignored.
